testcase.name: test_split_payment_invoice_has_fund_source_split

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected fund_source='split', got 'None' assert None == 'split'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payment_features.py:156: in test_split_payment_invoice_has_fund_source_split assert fund_source == "split", f"Expected fund_source='split', got '{fund_source}'" E AssertionError: Expected fund_source='split', got 'None' E assert None == 'split'

testcase.name: test_split_payment_invoice_has_cash_and_digital_amounts

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected cash_amount=153.0, got None assert None == 153.0

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payment_features.py:200: in test_split_payment_invoice_has_cash_and_digital_amounts assert stored_cash == cash_amt, f"Expected cash_amount={cash_amt}, got {stored_cash}" E AssertionError: Expected cash_amount=153.0, got None E assert None == 153.0

testcase.name: test_split_payment_invoice_has_digital_platform_and_ref

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected digital_platform='GCash', got 'None' assert None == 'GCash'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payment_features.py:245: in test_split_payment_invoice_has_digital_platform_and_ref assert dp == "GCash", f"Expected digital_platform='GCash', got '{dp}'" E AssertionError: Expected digital_platform='GCash', got 'None' E assert None == 'GCash'

testcase.name: test_split_payment_two_payment_entries

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 2 payment entries for split, got 1: [{'id': '06579c54-edd4-4295-9dce-a0e9fd52869a', 'amount': 510.0, 'date': '2026-02-24', 'method': 'Split', 'fund_source': 'split', 'reference': '', 'applied_to_interest': 0, 'applied_to_principal': 510.0, 'recorded_by': 'Janmark Ahig', 'recorded_at': '2026-02-24T08:11:40.135732+00:00'}] assert 1 == 2 + where 1 = len([{'amount': 510.0, 'applied_to_interest': 0, 'applied_to_principal': 510.0, 'date': '2026-02-24', ...}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payment_features.py:289: in test_split_payment_two_payment_entries assert len(payments) == 2, f"Expected 2 payment entries for split, got {len(payments)}: {payments}" E AssertionError: Expected 2 payment entries for split, got 1: [{'id': '06579c54-edd4-4295-9dce-a0e9fd52869a', 'amount': 510.0, 'date': '2026-02-24', 'method': 'Split', 'fund_source': 'split', 'reference': '', 'applied_to_interest': 0, 'applied_to_principal': 510.0, 'recorded_by': 'Janmark Ahig', 'recorded_at': '2026-02-24T08:11:40.135732+00:00'}] E assert 1 == 2 E + where 1 = len([{'amount': 510.0, 'applied_to_interest': 0, 'applied_to_principal': 510.0, 'date': '2026-02-24', ...}])

testcase.name: test_digital_payment_fund_source_digital

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected fund_source='digital', got 'None' assert None == 'digital'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payment_features.py:373: in test_digital_payment_fund_source_digital assert fs == "digital", f"Expected fund_source='digital', got '{fs}'" E AssertionError: Expected fund_source='digital', got 'None' E assert None == 'digital'

testcase.name: test_close_preview_digital_includes_split_payments

failure.message: AssertionError: Split invoice digital_amt=255.0 not reflected in close preview. pre_total=0, post_total=0 assert 0 >= (0 + 255.0)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payment_features.py:469: in test_close_preview_digital_includes_split_payments assert post_total >= pre_total + digital_amt, ( E AssertionError: Split invoice digital_amt=255.0 not reflected in close preview. pre_total=0, post_total=0 E assert 0 >= (0 + 255.0)

testcase.name: test_audit_compute_digital_includes_split_in_count

failure.message: AssertionError: transaction_count did not increase after split invoice. pre=0, post=0 assert 0 >= (0 + 1)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_split_payment_features.py:616: in test_audit_compute_digital_includes_split_in_count assert post_count >= pre_count + 1, ( E AssertionError: transaction_count did not increase after split invoice. pre=0, post=0 E assert 0 >= (0 + 1)
